title: isoetes × robusta
intro: Isoetes × robusta, also known as quillwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the genus Isoetes and is characterized by its unique, club-shaped leaves. The quillwort has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Isoetes × robusta is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, although its use is not well-documented in modern medicine.
